TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mark Aguirre 10 bulad 12 demiad, 1959 a mihca, Mark Aguirre, miunduay. Mark Aguirre nalecuhan i Chicago, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u adidi'ay ayaway mimaliay. Mark Aguirre i 1981 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 1, namapili' tu nu Dallas Mavericks putiput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza.
S.PHON: mark aguirrə ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, mark aguirrə, miunduaj. mark aguirrə nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦħiʦago, ir~ɾr~ɾinois, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u adidiʔ~ʡaj ajawaj mimar~ɾiaj. mark aguirrə i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dar~ɾr~ɾas ma*əriʦks putiput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza.
S.FORM: Mark Aguirre 10 bulad 12 demiad, 1959 a mihca, Mark Aguirre, miunduay. Mark Aguirre nalecuhan i Chicago, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u adidi'ay ayaway mimaliay. Mark Aguirre i 1981 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 1, namapili' tu nu Dallas Mavericks putiput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza.
S.PHON: mark aguirrə ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, mark aguirrə, miunduaj. mark aguirrə nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦħiʦago, ir~ɾr~ɾinois, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u adidiʔ~ʡaj ajawaj mimar~ɾiaj. mark aguirrə i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dar~ɾr~ɾas ma*əriʦks putiput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza.
